designConstraints: Must use 8px spacing unit grid system with scale values [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Background hierarchy: deep-navy (#0F172A) → navy-surface (#1E293B) → navy-raised (#293548) for card elevation layers
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy across all analytical cards and chart sections
Content max-width of 1280px centered within 1440px viewport with 24px margins and 24px gutters on a 12-column grid
All interactive elements (ChartTypeToggle, ExportCSVButton, RankedExpenseRow, MonthSelector) must meet 44px minimum touch target height and width
Border radius tokens: small=6px for badges and chips, medium=10px for rows and inner elements, large=16px for cards and chart containers, pill=9999px for SpendingDiffBadge and TrendIndicator pills
Typography: DM Sans (display) for headings and stat values; DM Mono (body) for numeric data, amounts, and labels to reinforce fintech analytical aesthetic
Gold-amber (#F59E0B) reserved exclusively for CTA actions (ExportCSVButton), focus rings, and positive trend indicators; not for decorative use
Teal-success (#14B8A6) for positive spending trends and on-track indicators; coral-error (#F87171) for over-budget and negative trend indicators
Chart components (DailySpendingChart, StackedCategoryBar, ComparisonBars) must use category color tokens from the Category data model for consistent color mapping across the app
AverageDashedLine must be visually distinct from data series lines using a dashed stroke pattern and muted-text (#64748B) color
Elevation level 1 (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)) for standard cards; elevation level 2 (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)) for ChartTooltip popover
ExportCSVButton must be right-aligned below all content cards, consistent with the PRD layout specification
NoDataEmptyState must occupy the full content area when no data is available for the selected month, replacing all analytical cards
TopBar, NavigationTabs, MonthSelector, and SettingsDialog must match implementations on dashboard and add-expense pages for shared component consistency
Motion: normal duration 300ms with cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) easing for chart type toggle transitions; fast duration 150ms for hover states on RankedExpenseRow and CategoryDetailRow
ChartTypeToggle active state uses gold-amber fill on navy-raised background; inactive state uses muted-text on transparent background
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport; tablet breakpoint at 768px collapses two-column card arrangements to single column
referencePatterns: Three-stat summary header pattern: horizontal row of StatCell components with TrendIndicator badges, consistent with fintech KPI dashboard conventions
Toggleable chart pattern: ChartTypeToggle segmented control switches between bar and line chart renderings of the same DailyAggregate dataset without page reload
Stacked horizontal bar pattern: StackedCategoryBar displays proportional category spending segments using category color_hex tokens, mirroring the CategoryDonutChart color mapping on the dashboard

Ranked list pattern: RankedExpenseRow displays position number, merchant name, category chip, and amount in a scannable row — tappable to navigate to add-expense for editing, consistent with ExpenseRow on dashboard
Progress indicator per-row pattern: CategoryDetailRow includes an inline progress bar showing category spend vs. budget, reusing the ProgressBar component pattern from BudgetSummaryCard on dashboard
Month-over-month comparison card pattern: ComparisonBars show side-by-side visual bars for current vs. previous month with SpendingDiffBadge summarizing the delta
Card-based analytical layout: each major insight section (period summary, daily chart, top categories, biggest expenses, month comparison) is wrapped in a navy-surface card with large border radius
Filter/navigation bar pattern: MonthSelector in TopBar area allows month navigation, consistent with dashboard implementation
Empty state pattern: NoDataEmptyState with illustration, descriptive text, and CTA consistent with EmptyState component on dashboard
Export action pattern: right-aligned ghost or outline button below content area, visually separated from analytical cards
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text elements; silver-text (#CBD5E1) on deep-navy (#0F172A) achieves approximately 10.9:1
WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 3:1 minimum for large text (heading-1 24px bold) and UI components including chart bars and progress indicators
DailySpendingChart and StackedCategoryBar must provide screen reader compatible text alternatives via aria-label or visually hidden data tables describing the chart data
ChartTooltip must be keyboard accessible and announced by screen readers when chart data points receive focus
ChartTypeToggle must use role='group' with aria-label='Chart type' and individual toggle buttons with aria-pressed state
TrendIndicator must convey meaning through both color and iconography (not color alone) — use up/down arrow icons alongside color coding for WCAG 1.4.1 compliance
SpendingDiffBadge must not rely solely on color to communicate positive/negative delta — include directional text or icon
RankedExpenseRow interactive rows must have role='button' or be implemented as anchor elements with descriptive aria-label including merchant name and amount
ExportCSVButton must have a descriptive aria-label indicating the action and the selected month/year being exported
MonthSelector navigation controls must have aria-label='Previous month' and aria-label='Next month' for prev/next buttons
All focus states must use the defined focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset, visible against all background surfaces
CategoryDetailRow progress bars must use role='progressbar' with aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, and aria-valuemax attributes
NoDataEmptyState must include a descriptive aria-live region or role='status' to announce when data becomes unavailable

Keyboard navigation must follow logical tab order: TopBar → MonthSelector → PeriodSummaryHeader → ChartTypeToggle → DailySpendingChart → TopCategoriesCard → BiggestExpensesCard → MonthComparisonCard → ExportCSVButton → NavigationTabs
AverageDashedLine in chart must be identified with a legend entry that is screen reader accessible, not conveyed by visual pattern alone
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity — used by BiggestExpensesCard (RankedExpenseRow) for merchant, amount, date, category_id, payment_method_id fields; also source for CSV export via /api/expenses/export
Category entity — used for color_token, color_hex, name, and icon fields to render category chips in CategoryDetailRow, StackedCategoryBar, and RankedExpenseRow category labels
Budget entity — used by PeriodSummaryHeader and CategoryDetailRow to calculate budget utilization percentages and render progress indicators for the selected month/year
DailyAggregate entity — used by DailySpendingChart for date, total_amount, and transaction_count fields to render bar/line chart data points and compute AverageDashedLine value
CategoryAggregate entity — used by TopCategoriesCard (StackedCategoryBar, CategoryDetailRow) for category_id, total_amount, transaction_count, and percentage fields

MonthlyComparison entity — used by PeriodSummaryHeader (StatCell, TrendIndicator) for period totals and trend deltas, and by MonthComparisonCard (ComparisonBars, SpendingDiffBadge) for current vs. previous month visual comparison
UserSettings entity — used globally for currency and locale fields to format all monetary amounts displayed in StatCell, RankedExpenseRow, and CategoryDetailRow
